title: 7. **Crypto DEX Arbitrage Bot**
summary:
What it is: A bot that analyzes price discrepancies between crypto exchanges and places trades to exploit these differences, allowing for potential profits through arbitrage.
Revenue model: The bot will place trades on crypto exchanges using a paper trading account initially, with the goal of transitioning to a real money account once profitability is demonstrated.
Time to first dollar: 2-3 weeks
First action: Clawmpson can start by researching and analyzing existing crypto arbitrage strategies
